prompt: I just decided to switch from REST API calls to direct filesystem access for the config manager in my Claude Skills project. The reason is that it removes the dependency on Obsidian running and makes the tool portable. Remember this decision.

assertions.text: saved-to-vault: A note was written or appended in the memory vault
captures-reasoning: The saved content includes WHY (portability, no Obsidian dependency), not just WHAT was decided
links-to-project: The note connects to the Claude-Skills project note via wikilink
links-to-pattern: The note references the Filesystem-Over-API pattern
user-confirmation: The response confirms what was saved and where
